# Edison Arias — Arias Latin Party

> Premium Latin DJ, live sound engineering, and high-energy Hora Loca
> productions serving New Jersey and the New York Tri-State area, with
> 30+ years of experience.

## About

Edison Arias is a professional DJ and sound engineer originally from
Ecuador, now serving the NY/NJ Tri-State area. He specializes in Latin
music and full-production live events — combining technical sound mastery
with high-energy entertainment.

## Services

- **Professional DJ**: Weddings, quinceañeras, corporate events, and
  nightclubs. Styles include Latino House, Tribal House, Cumbia-House
  Fusion, Top 40, and Tech-House.
- **Audio Engineering**: Live sound for orchestras and bands, with 30
  years of acoustic precision.
- **Hora Loca**: High-energy party hour with LED robots, professional
  dancers, and props.
- **Lighting Design**: Intelligent beam sequences and atmospheric lighting.

## Service Area

New Jersey, New York, and the greater Tri-State area.

## Contact

- Phone: (201) 898-7592 / (201) 554-4914
- Booking: send an inquiry via the website contact section.

## FAQ

- **What areas are served?** New Jersey and the NY Tri-State area.
- **What music styles?** Latin: Latino House, Tribal House, Cumbia-House
  Fusion, Top 40, Tech-House.
- **What is Hora Loca?** A high-energy party segment with LED robots and
  professional dancers — offered as a full production.
- **How to book?** Call (201) 898-7592 or use the website contact section.
